case_title: SUMSKI, JACK DBA DAVIS REALTY vs. DAILY, KAREN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUMSKI, JACK DBA DAVIS REALTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAILY, KAREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR ST #454, LEASE FORFEITED
